_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalized Human Schwann Cell Lines Derived From Tumors of Schwannomatosis Patients.

_contextSnippet: Using DAVID we performed gene ontology clustering on the differentially expressed genes. The upregulated genes clustered into 12 groups. The cluster with greatest enrichment score contained mitosis related genes...The downregulated genes clustered into 25 groups. The cluster with the greatest enrichment score contained genes relating to immune response and myelination
details: Successfully clustered upregulated genes into 12 groups with mitosis-related genes showing greatest enrichment score (30.374), and downregulated genes into 25 groups with immune response and myelination genes showing greatest enrichment
